---
title: "Anthony Faustine"
subtitle: "Principal ML Engineer<br>Analog Devices, Ireland"
pagetitle: "Anthony Faustine | Portfolio"
description-meta: "Principal ML Engineer and Systems Architect specializing in machine learning system design and implementation at scale, with strategic technology leadership and engineering excellence at Analog Devices, Ireland."

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: ../../images/profiles/sambaiga_profile.jpg
  image-alt: "Professional headshot of Anthony Faustine"
  image-width: 18em


format:
  html:
    body-class: "about"
grid:
  body-width: 1200px
author-meta: Anthony Faustine
---
::: {#hero-heading .text-justify .text-md-start}
I am a **Principal ML Engineer** at [Analog Devices](https://www.analog.com) in Ireland, building production ML systems for supply chain optimization and intelligent edge computing. Over 10+ years, I've designed, deployed, and scaled ML systems across energy, industrial, and semiconductor domains.

I specialize in **machine learning system design and implementation at scale**. From architecture and modeling through production governance and observability, I drive strategic technology leadership that translates research into resilient, production-grade systems. I advance engineering excellence through mentorship and cross-functional leadership.

> My mission: architect and deliver ML systems that solve real business problems with measurable impact.

### Ready to collaborate?
I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, research collaborations, technical speaking engagements, or mentoring emerging AI engineers.



::: {.hero-actions .d-flex .justify-content-center .gap-3 .mt-4}
[Schedule a Chat <i class="bi bi-calendar me-2"></i>](https://calendly.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Download CV <i class="bi bi-download me-2"></i>](/files/Anthony_CV_2026_ADI.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
